name: Selsig Morgannwg (Glamorgan Sausages)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the breadcrumbs and grated cheese together.
2. Add the finely chopped onion and season with salt and pepper.
3. Beat together one egg and one egg yolk, then add this to the mixture to bind it.
4. Form the mixture into even sausage shapes (about 12).
5. Roll each sausage in flour.
6. Dip them in beaten egg white mixed with a pinch of raspings.
7. Fry the sausages in hot fat or oil.
Glamorgan Sausages are particularly appetising served with fresh green salad and red peppers. An ideal dish for a summer's day picnic.
